# Carbonate Cycle

**Summary**: The cyclical deposition of carbonate sediments in a marine environment.

---

## How It Appears in the Thesis Collection

- [[1992-el-sahn|El-Sahn, 1992]] identified a shallowing upward carbonate cycle at Jabal Hafeet.

## Scientific Context

- [[1992-el-sahn|El-Sahn, 1992]] Used to interpret the evolution of the shelf environment.

## Measurement and Characterization Methods

- [[1992-el-sahn|El-Sahn, 1992]] interpreted from stratigraphic and microfacies analysis

## Key Findings Across Sources

- The succession represents a shallowing upward carbonate cycle moving from open marine shelf to shelf edge conditions. ([[1992-el-sahn|El-Sahn, 1992, p. 13]])
- [[1992-el-sahn|El-Sahn, 1992]] shallowing upward cycle
